name: American Southwest
description_short: American Southwest Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union headquartered in Sierra Vista, Arizona, offering banking, lending, and mortgage services to members.
description_long:
American Southwest Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative based in Sierra Vista, Arizona, with a main office located at 3090 E Fry Boulevard. The credit union provides traditional banking products and services including deposit accounts, credit products, and mortgage lending to its membership base.

The institution offers a range of financial services including checking and savings accounts, credit and lending products, mortgages, and ATM/branch access. Members can access drive-thru teller and ATM services, video banking, safety deposit boxes, notary public services, and coin counting machines at their main location.

American Southwest Credit Union maintains a physical branch presence with locator services and ATM networks. The credit union advertises commitment to member service and tailored financial solutions, positioning itself as a community-focused financial institution.

However, the credit union carries significant service quality concerns based on documented member reviews. With a 2.5 out of 5 star rating and 50% of reviews being one-star ratings, recurring issues include technical problems with card issuance systems, difficulties accessing online account management, unresolved lien removal on paid-off loans, employee attitude problems, and complaints about overdraft fee practices. Members report multi-day service outages, unresponsive customer service, and general frustration with basic banking processes. Several reviewers explicitly recommend avoiding the institution despite its long operating history. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Offers drive-thru teller service for convenient banking access
Provides video banking for remote member interactions
Operates safety deposit boxes for document and valuables storage
Maintains notary public services for member convenience
Offers coin counting machines for cash handling
Provides ATM and branch locator tools for members
Credit union structure offers member-owned cooperative benefits
cons: 2.5 out of 5 star rating with 50% one-star reviews indicating systemic service problems
Documented card issuance system failures leaving members unable to access funds for multiple days
Online account access issues preventing members from managing accounts remotely
Staff reportedly unresponsive to complaints and dismissive of member service failures
Loan servicing problems including inability to remove liens on paid-off loans despite repeated member requests
best_for: Members seeking local Sierra Vista area credit union membership with branch access
Customers with existing accounts who are locked into the institution
Members less reliant on online banking and card technology systems
diagnosis: American Southwest Credit Union is appropriate only for members who already have accounts or require local Sierra Vista branch access and can tolerate inconsistent service quality. The main caveat is the documented 2.5-star rating with severe complaints about system failures, unresponsive staff, and unethical overdraft practices—new members should carefully research alternatives before joining.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
